title: Beef Kalamata Crunch
description: A show-off Thai dish featuring beef and kalamata olives for a mediterranean-friendly umami experience.

ingredients.name: 200g shiitake mushrooms, stems removed and caps finely chopped

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add olive oil.
Add beef strips and sauté for about 5 minutes until browned, stirring occasionally.
Push the beef to one side of the pan and add sliced kalamata olives to the other side. Sauté until olives are slightly softened and fragrant.
Stir in minced garlic, red bell pepper, yellow onion, and shiitake mushrooms. Cook for another 5 minutes until vegetables start to soften.
Add soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, sesame oil, salt, and pepper. Stir everything together well.
Reduce heat to low-medium and simmer for about 20-30 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly and beef is tender.
Serve hot as an appetizer with rice or naan bread.
